contract_claim: Comment says 'Don't try to reject pending requests - they should already be resolved'. The code clears the map entirely (L58) without resolving or rejecting, which would silently drop any genuinely pending promises. This assumption may not hold if stop() is called while real async requests are in flight.
observed_behavior: Comment says 'Don't try to reject pending requests - they should already be resolved'. The code clears the map entirely (L58) without resolving or rejecting, which would silently drop any genuinely pending promises. This assumption may not hold if stop() is called while real async requests are in flight.
